steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: Noguchi's father is at the station looking for Noguchi among other people after an eleven-year absence. The next sentence explains that the father could not recognize him because Noguchi had changed so much, so the underlined word refers to spotting a person in a crowd.

steps.title: Rule out mismatches
steps.content: Choice B means influence, which does not fit a father searching a station. Choice C means make known or visible, but the father is not revealing Noguchi to anyone. Choice D means judge harshly, which has no support in the scene. The answer is A.
